SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AuthErrorCatalog
Catalog for all authentication and authorization related exceptions.
BaseException
Base abstract class for all custom exceptions within the application.
BaseException.Builder<E>
Builder class for dynamically constructing instances of BaseException subclasses by overriding properties mapped in the default catalog.
BaseExceptionCatalog
Interface that defines the contract for all exception catalogs.
BusinessErrorCatalog
Catalog for business logic and domain rule violations.
DatabaseErrorCatalog
Catalog for database related exceptions.
ExceptionDef
Annotation used to bind a specific exception class to its corresponding error catalog.
ForbiddenException
Exception thrown when a user is authenticated but does not have the required permissions to access a specific resource.
GenericBusinessException
Exception thrown when a general business rule is violated.
GenericDatabaseException
Exception thrown when a generic error occurs while accessing or modifying the database.
GenericRuntimeErrorCatalog
Catalog for generic runtime errors.
GenericRuntimeException
Exception thrown when an unexpected or uncategorized runtime error occurs.
HttpErrorCatalog
Catalog for HTTP and web client communication related exceptions.
HttpException
Exception thrown when a generic HTTP error occurs during the processing of a request.
InvalidCredentialsException
Exception thrown when the credentials (e.g.
NotFoundException
Exception thrown when a requested resource could not be found in the system.
TokenExpiredException
Exception thrown when the authentication token provided by the client has expired.
UnauthorizedException
Exception thrown when authentication is required but missing or invalid for a specific resource.
ValidException
Exception thrown when a request payload fails validation rules.
WebClientException
Exception thrown when an error occurs during communication with an external web service or API.
